reasons: Tigreal can start fights and hold enemies in place for Natan's ranged follow-up damage.
Natan benefits from a durable frontline that gives him time to maintain damage output.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the engage window, while Natan follows with ranged damage from behind the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Natan is in safe follow-up range.
Natan keeps distance instead of walking into the first crowd-control zone.
failureCases: Natan is flanked before he can deal damage.

reasons: Atlas can group enemies, giving Natan a clear teamfight damage window.
Natan's ranged output benefits when enemies are controlled instead of free to dive him.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies, and Natan uses the setup to apply ranged damage while staying behind the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Atlas engages within Natan's damage range.
Natan positions safely before Atlas commits.
failureCases: Atlas catches targets outside Natan's angle.
Natan is forced to retreat instead of follow up.
The enemy spreads before the setup lands.

reasons: Lolita gives Natan safer backline structure against poke and direct engage.
Natan benefits from peel because his damage depends on staying alive and positioned.

proof.summary: Lolita protects the backline, giving Natan more time to maintain ranged damage output.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stays close enough to protect Natan.
Natan respects the protected zone instead of stepping too far forward.
failureCases: Enemy flankers attack from outside Lolita's coverage.
Natan mispositions before peel is available.

reasons: Rafaela's movement speed helps Natan kite, chase, or reset spacing.
Her healing supports Natan through extended fights where he needs damage uptime.

proof.summary: Rafaela gives Natan movement and sustain, helping him keep distance while continuing damage.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela stays near Natan during skirmishes.
Natan uses the speed boost to kite safely.
failureCases: Natan is burst before healing matters.
Enemy hard crowd control locks Natan despite the movement support.

reasons: Mathilda gives Natan an extra repositioning option when enemies dive him.
Her shield supports Natan during the first pressure window of a fight.

proof.summary: Mathilda helps Natan survive and reposition, improving his chance to maintain damage uptime.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for dive or reset moments.
Natan stays close enough to use the movement support.
failureCases: Natan stands too far from Mathilda.
Mathilda uses Guiding Wind before the real dive.
Enemy burst kills Natan before he can reposition.
